items.claim: Steve Erceg presents a potential wrestling threat.
items.quote: what he may be able to do in the wrestling department

items.claim: John Pork will be the superior striker in a kickboxing-style matchup.
items.quote: John Pork's going to be the better striker in what should be a kickboxing match

items.claim: Axel Sola brings high pressure and mental toughness.
items.quote: Axel Sola with the pressure. I know he has dog in him, so I don't have to worry about if things get tough, is he going to break?

items.claim: Bonfim tends to break when fights get tough.
items.quote: his opponent, will break if things get tough

items.claim: John Pork is largely untested as a fighter.
Axel Sola is coming off a loss.
items.quote: Axel Sola is tested, he is coming off a loss

items.claim: Thomas Peterson is a strong wrestler who can secure takedowns and top control.
items.quote: Thomas Peterson is just a corn-fed wrestler

items.claim: Valter Walker has a lifelong wrestling background from Russia and decent takedowns.
items.quote: Valter Walker grew up in Russia. He's been wrestling his whole life. Like he's got decent takedowns.

items.claim: Valter Walker demonstrated a decent chin after absorbing hard shots in his previous fight.
items.quote: He also has a decent chin. I watched him get cracked in his last fight.

items.claim: Valter Walker is coming off four consecutive heel hook submissions.
items.quote: Valter Walker is coming off four heel hook submissions in a row.
